ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "week_ending_date" TEXT /* Date the week ends */,
  "weekly_earnings" REAL /* Earnings for the week */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in earnings from the previous week */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters showing the film */,
  "avg_earnings_per_theater" REAL /* Average earnings per theater */,
  "total_earnings_to_date" REAL /* Total earnings up to the current week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number since the film's release */,
  "estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is estimated */,
  "domestic_earnings" REAL /* Domestic earnings for the week */,
  "international_earnings" REAL /* International earnings for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the theater */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seat capacity of the theater */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the theater (e.g., 2D, 3D, IMAX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_theater_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film-theater mapping */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theater */,
  "week_ending_date" TEXT /* Date the week ends */,
  "showtimes" TEXT /* Showtimes for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_theater_mapping_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_theater_mapping_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., executive, financial analyst, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "predicted_earnings" REAL /* Predicted earnings */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the forecasting model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend analysis was conducted */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media metric */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the social media platform */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement rate on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
